items.title: Is Myles Garrett better than Deacon Jones?

items.excerpt: By being traded to the Los Angeles Rams, Myles Garrett isn’t just joining a team, he’s becoming a part of a rich NFL legacy. The Rams have employed several of the best pass rushers in the history of football: Deacon Jones and Jack Youngblood on the edges. Aaron Donald and Merlin Olsen on the inside.
